title: Celebrate being Canadian - Canada.ca
content:
## Celebrate being Canadian
Canadians are proud of their citizenship. We value the rights and freedoms and accept the responsibilities that this status gives us

## Services and information

### Take part in our citizenship
Attend or host a citizenship ceremony, organize a reaffirmation ceremony and celebrate Canada Day and Citizenship Week

### Canadian identity and society
Anthems and symbols, languages, Indigenous peoples and cultures, human rights and multiculturalism
How newcomers made Canada their new home
Resources and games to teach citizenship, immigration and multiculturalism subjects

### Rights and Responsibilities of Citizenship
Equality of women and men, Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms and defending Canada

### Canada: A history of refuge
Learn more about the history of refugees in Canada

### Francophone Immigration in Canada: a part of our history
How Francophone immigration contributes to Canada’s cultural richness and socioeconomic development

### Explore Parks Canada
New Canadian permanent residents and citizens can enjoy free admission to national parks, historic sites and marine conservation areas for a year.
Check out our featured videos on citizenship
- Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
